title: Quaternary Begins
description: Long glacial-interglacial cycles intensify at the start of the Quaternary Period.

title: Homo sapiens Appears
description: Our species emerges in Africa during the late Pleistocene.

title: Last Glacial Maximum
description: Ice sheets reach their greatest extent during the last glacial period.

title: Younger Dryas Begins
description: A sudden return to colder conditions interrupts the end of the last Ice Age.

title: Holocene Begins
description: The current warm interglacial epoch begins about 11,700 years ago.
